'''Varlinaar''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Varlinaar system/Legends|Varlinaar system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. [[Rorworr (Naboo)|Rorworr]] once smuggled a team of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] into the Imperial base on the planet under the pretense of bringing the Imperials rare foods.

{{Planet-stub}}
